zh.lifeSummary: Anna於大約1508年出生。她於大約1530年與Ansel Kerber在德國爾特波格可萊斯 伯布林根辛德爾分根結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1575年11月30日在德國爾特波格可萊斯 伯布林根辛德爾分根享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anna于大约1508年出生。她于大约1530年与Ansel Kerber在德国爾特波格可萊斯 伯布林根辛德爾分根结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1575年11月30日在德国爾特波格可萊斯 伯布林根辛德爾分根享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: Anna was born about 1508. She married Ansel Kerber about 1530, in Sindelfingen, Böblingen, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 30 November 1575, in Sindelfingen, Böblingen, Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Anna est née environ 1508. Elle a épousé Ansel Kerber environ 1530, à Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 novembre 1575, à Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Anna wurde um 1508 geboren. Sie hat um 1530 in Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Deutschland Ansel Kerber geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. November 1575 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Anna è nata il circa 1508. Lei sposato Ansel Kerber circa 1530, nel Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 30 novembre 1575, nel Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Germania, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Annaは約1508年に生まれた。約1530年にドイツウuルッテンバーグクレイス ブoブリンジェンシンデルフィンジェンでAnsel Kerberと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1575年11月30日にドイツウuルッテンバーグクレイス ブoブリンジェンシンデルフィンジェンで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna(은)는 대략 1508년 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1530년 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 브o블링 신델핀겐에서 Ansel Kerber(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1575년 11월 30일 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 브o블링 신델핀겐에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Anna nasceu aproximadamente 1508. Ela casou-se com Ansel Kerber aproximadamente 1530, em Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de novembro de 1575, em Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Alemanha, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Anna родилась около 1508 г. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ansel Kerber около 1530 г. в местности синделфинген, крис бoблинген, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 30 ноября 1575 г. в местности синделфинген, крис бoблинген, вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Anna nació aproximadamente 1508. Se casó con Ansel Kerber aproximadamente 1530, en Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 30 de noviembre de 1575, en Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 68 años.
